---
title: "Caroline Elizabeth Cooke Trench"
---

## Caroline Elizabeth Cooke Trench

**Dates:** (1833-24 Nov 1910)

**Maiden name:** (Heathcote)

### Description

daughter of Sir William Heathcote

### Biography

Only daughter of the first marriage of Sir William Heathcote, she married (17 Aug 1858) Thomas Richard Frederick Cooke Trench (18 Aug 1829-26 Nov 1902), an Anglo-Irish landowner, and they set about creating a Tractarian country house in Ireland. [Awdry, <i>A Country Gentleman</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 10th 1893
- Letter from March 28th [1884] 
- Letter from Aug 21st [1881]
- Letter from July 27th 1876
- Letter from October 8, 1868
- Letter from November 3, 1859
- Letter from February 16, 1859
- Letter from Novr 7th 1857
- Letter from April 21 1857
- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Oct 21st 1844[[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
